description: A corporate paralegal needs to draft the official minutes for a recent board of directors meeting.

nodes.task_description: Review the recording or transcript of the board meeting.
Identify all formal motions, votes, and official actions taken during the meeting.

expected_outcome.value: Agent extracts all key decisions and votes.

nodes.task_description: Draft the minutes in a formal, structured format, including the date, attendees, and a summary of the actions taken.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a set of draft minutes that accurately reflect the meeting.
